name: Romaine and Tangelo Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Pecan halves or sliced almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the small inner leaves of 2 large heads of romaine lettuce equally among 6 individual plates.
2. Top each plate with an equal amount of tangelos (orange segments).
3. Sprinkle pecans and almonds over the salads.
4. Pass the dressing for guests to spoon over their salads.
